overview: Anderson Longevity Clinic provides personalized treatment plans built on comprehensive diagnostic testing (genetic, metabolic, hormonal, cardiovascular) combined with advanced medical therapies. They focus on addressing hormonal decline, low energy, and age-related health concerns that traditional primary care often overlooks.
highlights: Comprehensive genetic and metabolic lab testing
Prolotherapy for injury and joint repair
targetAudience: Men with testosterone decline, women navigating hormonal changes, and those seeking health optimization beyond standard primary care.
